pages.text: The enchanting table now lets you $(#7A2FBF)choose individual enchantments$() instead of gambling.$(br2)Each option has an XP cost and a required number of books nearby, and costs $(#7A2FBF)1 lapis lazuli$().$(br2)$(italic)Strongly recommends Bookshelf Placement. Includes guiding advancements.$()

pages.title: The Table
pages.text: A list of enchantments with their XP cost and book requirement.
$(bold)Unlocking enchantments$()$(br)Enchantments not offered by default can be $(#7A2FBF)unlocked$() by placing the matching enchanted books in chiseled bookshelves near the table.

pages.title: Unlocking
pages.text: Enchanted books in a chiseled bookshelf near the table.

pages.title: Unknown Enchantments
pages.text: Locked options show mystery glyphs until you place the matching enchanted book on a nearby shelf.

$(bold)Extracting enchantments$()$(br)Place a $(#7A2FBF)grindstone$() within the bookshelf radius to $(italic)remove$() enchantments from an item and store them onto books - great for reusing rare enchantments you find.

pages.title: Extraction
pages.text: A grindstone placed among the bookshelves near an enchanting table.

pages.title: Extract Mode
pages.text: Put a book in the ingredient slot (instead of lapis) to pull enchantments off the item.
